lockedNoGoRules: Predicta must not use report/toolkit/internal-system language as the primary user answer.
Predicta must not spend AI on deterministic app actions or local-memory answers.
Predicta must keep specialist-room methods separate unless synthesis is requested.
Predicta must not invent missing chart, signature, report, payment, or family context.
Predicta must not expose repetitive provider-decision machinery in normal user copy.
Predicta must keep English, Hindi, and Gujarati language-correct without weird leakage.
